characters.profile: アドマイヤグルーヴです。\n甘さも優しさも、私には必要ありません。\n自分を高めていきたい…それだけですから
characters.slogan: 気高く、凜と\n――孤に咲く蒼銀の花
characters.weaknesses: 囲み取材、スキンシップ全般

characters.profile: Admire Vega. ...Can I go now? I need to train more, win more races, and I need to become a first-magnitude star.
characters.slogan: Burdened with resolve. A first magnitude star who stays alone.

characters.profile: Hewwo! I'm Digi-tan! I'm a massive fan of all of the sparkling Umamusume! I'm so happy every day! I'm so glad I was born an otaku!~♪
characters.slogan: She loves Umamusume! A super all-around otaku.
characters.strengths: Her massage techniques are in a league of their own

characters.profile: Aren't you interested about how fast a Umamusume can go? If you are, I, Agnes Tachyon, would like you to be my guinea pig.
characters.slogan: A Forbidden Mad Scientist. Physical research is everything!

characters.profile: I am Air Groove. If you don't bend your beliefs, your ideals will surely sprout. To demonstrate this, I, the Empress, will be the guiding light for everyone.
characters.slogan: Level-headed "Empress",a talented and colorful career lady!

characters.profile: Air Messiah. I want to be strong and graceful, like my mother was. I will prove the greatness and value of the future.
characters.slogan: Steadfast in achieving her mother's wish that she carries with her.
characters.strengths: Clearing every single line off the chalkboard

characters.profile: I'm Air Shakur. In any case, data speaks louder than victory or defeat. I don't have a problem with simulation, I'll screw you over, logistically.
characters.slogan: Let's be logical! An eccentric genius girl.

characters.profile: I'm Almond Eye. I will win, even if my opponent's a legend. That's what I believe in!
characters.slogan: Hates losing with a passion! The ultimate challenger.
characters.strengths: アイコンタクト、間違い探し

characters.profile: I'm Machan. Aston Machan. I will eventually become the world's mascot. Keep looking straight at me with those eyes.
characters.slogan: A mascot to aim for. Some transient and eccentric girl.

characters.profile: Hey there! Bamboo Memory! I'm going to run hard to earn the name of "Demon Chairman of the Public Discipline Committee"!
characters.slogan: Seeking serious competition! The hot-blooded chairman of the Public Morals Committee!
characters.strengths: Early to bed, early to rise, quick decisions!

characters.profile: ビリーヴです。\nいい仕事をしたいと思います。\n…………お願いします
characters.slogan: 『最速』とは業の極み\n堅忍不抜の職人ウマ娘
characters.weaknesses: 犬が悲しい目にあう話

characters.profile: The hero of justice, Biko Pegasus, is here! I can take down any formidable foe and make everyone smile! Isn't that great!
characters.slogan: The flame of justice burns bright! A passionate Hero rises!
characters.weaknesses: Eating too much without realizing it

characters.profile: I'm Biwa Hayahide. My goal is to assemble the perfect winning formula. ...Also, I have a normal-sized head!
characters.slogan: Passionate intellect. Use logic as your weapon!

characters.profile: It's me, Blast Onepiece! Humans are so friendly to me. I love them super duper much! I wanna get closer to them and get to know them even better!
characters.slogan: A friendly Umamusume with a great fondness for humans.

characters.profile: I declare: "As shock troop commander, I will conceive the cyclone of the Big Four!" Let's expand our dream together!
characters.slogan: A shock troop commander with a fighting spirit and an expanding dream!
characters.strengths: Balloon modelling, singing western music a capella

characters.profile: I'm Buena Vista! I want to fulfil my promise. To reach that beautiful scenery.
characters.slogan: One day she will reach the scenery she longs for. An earnest Umamusume full of love.

characters.profile: Calstone Light O. My dream is to break all speed records. My favorite thing... Straight lines. That's it. Even my introduction goes by in a flash.
characters.slogan: To the light, and beyond! A leader who presses on at top speed.
characters.strengths: Cleaning floors, racing duels while dizzy

characters.profile: I desire to solidify my future through coronation with the tiara. ――Oh, and nice to meet you!
characters.slogan: A strict warrior and holy mother. An Umamusume with two sides.

characters.profile: I'm... Sheval Grand... I know I'm nothing... special... But one day... I'll achieve greatne— N-no, I'll try my hardest!
characters.slogan: A shy Umamusume full of ambition. Aiming for greatness.
characters.strengths: Fishing in the sea, baseball, spending time alone

characters.profile: クロノジェネシスです。レース史を\n探究するのが好きで…私も、刻みたいと\n思っています。自分の蹄跡を
characters.slogan: 稀代のレース史好き。\n新時代の創生を！
characters.strengths: 走り書き、タイムスケジュール管理

characters.profile: Rickey ☆ Lucky ☆ Auspicious ☆ Copano Rickey! The power of Feng Shui will bring you happiness too ♪
characters.slogan: Rickey ☆ Lucky ☆ A helpful Feng shui girl ☆

characters.profile: カレンブーケドールです。好きなことは、\nお花を綺麗に飾ること。あと、そうですね…\n争いごとは――少し、苦手かもしれません
characters.slogan: 願いと優しさを束ねて駆ける\n可憐なる華

characters.profile: I'm Curren, a.k.a. Curren Chan! I'm going to wrap the world in "cuteness"!☆ Don't look away, look at Curren ♪
characters.slogan: A flash of adorable light! Love her lots ♪

characters.profile: My name is Daiichi Ruby. To be supreme is the duty of my family. I will strive to fulfill my duty.
characters.slogan: Victory is a must. An umamusume from a brilliant family.

characters.profile: Weee~iii! I'm Daitaku Helios~! I'm gonna run the most hype race ever, so please give me your best call! ☆
characters.slogan: Live it up ☆ Party Everyday!
characters.strengths: Mad good at Old Maid, crazy fashionable
characters.weaknesses: Silence got her blue, formal speech's more like purple

characters.profile: Hello, I'm Daiwa Scarlet! I'll do my best to... Hmph! I'm going to be number one. That's all!
characters.slogan: Self-important! A girl with a competitive streak!

characters.profile: I'm Dantsu Flame. Hey, no fighting okay? I work hardest after eating something sweet, I guess?
characters.slogan: A nice-natured Umamusume with a cute side. She's easily swayed by others.
characters.strengths: 「髪型ちょっと変えた？」の正解率100％

characters.profile: Follow my lead!　期待していてね。\n私には必ずティアラの輝きが降りそそぐ。\n未来のクイーン・デアリングハートにね！
characters.slogan: 洗練された自信\n煌めくはクイーンハート！
characters.strengths: アコギで即興作曲、尻尾ブラッシング

characters.profile: デアリングタクトです。厳しくも温かく\n育んでくれた故郷のため…夢は大きく、\n『歴史に残るウマ娘になる』、です！
characters.slogan: 清廉なる大自然の申し子

characters.profile: I, Dream Journey am there for you if you're looking to go on an expedition beyond your dreams. I can feel it in you.
characters.slogan: One ought not to look into the eyes on a dream journey filled with happiness.

characters.profile: ...I'm Duramente. My goal is not to win, but to lead with great strength. ...That's all.
characters.slogan: The strongest passion flows through her. She's the fruit of an esteemed family.
characters.strengths: Testing her agility (esp. the Side-Step test)

characters.profile: My holy sword shall release a blazing light, which shall free you from the darkness that devours you. My name is Durandal. I vow to be your loyal knight!
characters.slogan: Pay heed! The devoted sacred sword with dazzling footwork.
characters.strengths: Mowing grass, writing in-depth reviews of romance shows

characters.profile: My name is Eishin Flash. In order to keep the tradition of Umamusume alive, I will continue to run. Every race and everything else is on schedule.
characters.slogan: Everything is according to plan. The respectful and honest Mädchen.

characters.profile: I'm the crimson bird that runs the course! El Condor Pasa is closing in! I'm flying around the world!
characters.slogan: Mystery North American bird! The cheerful and eccentric lucha libre

characters.profile: This here gal's Espoir City! Keep them races comin'! I'll leave 'em in the... dust...? Hey, hands off! I didn't ask ya to pat my head!
characters.slogan: "Beat me if you can!" A rebellious girl who loves to bicker.
characters.strengths: 部屋の片づけ、ダイススタッキング

characters.profile: はっ！本官はフェノーメノ、所属は\n中央トレセン学園であります！子どもたちの\n規範となるべく、粉骨砕身してまいります！
characters.slogan: 厳格なる正義――\n走る強面おまわりさん
characters.strengths: 書道、感謝状を書くこと
characters.weaknesses: ヘアワックス、ハッカ飴

characters.profile: Good day, I'm Fine Motion! I want to make lots of great memories. First things first, I want to know where the best noodle shops are. ♪
characters.slogan: A free-spirited memory maker! She's a sheltered Royal Lady.

characters.profile: Hi!　フォーエバーヤングだよ！\nロードマップの準備はOK！ウマ娘界に\nイノベーション、起こすしかないっしょ！
characters.slogan: 革新もたらす\nカリスマギャルウマ娘

characters.profile: I'm the jet-black entertainer, Fuji Kiseki! I'll make you smile with my best "miracle"!
characters.slogan: Leave the escorting to me! A gorgeous & gentle girl!

characters.profile: I'm Furioso. No, I don't come from Chuo. I made a special transfer from Funabashi and I'm not afraid to show you what we're made of.
characters.slogan: A calm transfer student from the countryside, with unwavering love of Funabashi.
characters.strengths: Giving tours of Funabashi (she made her own map)

characters.slogan: 飛び出せ！\n無限の希望とマシュマロハート♡
characters.strengths: だいたいぜ～んぶ♡（早着替え、口笛）
characters.weaknesses: キツすぎちゃうのはイヤ

characters.profile: Logic and reason? Pure nonsense. Winning is the only thing that matters, no? I won't let anything get in my way to do so.
characters.slogan: A strong-willed lady with blossoming strength!

characters.profile: Gold City. ...Just so you know, I won't forgive you if you treat me like a doll. Don't judge me by my looks, but by the way I run.
characters.slogan: A blunt, but high-quality gal!

characters.profile: Yo, I'm Gold Ship! I don't care if it's on the turf, on fire, or at the edge of the universe. I'm going to find something interesting wherever I can! ☆
characters.slogan: Rude and unrestrained! An enigmatic golden denpa girl!

characters.profile: Gran Alegria here! From 0.75 miles to 1.25 miles nothing can stop this here future Queen of Mile!
characters.slogan: With a s-mile, anything is possible! The strongest Mile Umamusume.
characters.strengths: 運動全般、ソフトクリームを綺麗に巻くこと
characters.weaknesses: 深海魚、静かな場所、かくれんぼ

characters.profile: My name is Grass Wonder. Since I was born as a Umamusume, I want to pursue this path to the end. Hehe ♪
characters.slogan: Neat and pretty. The ideal Japanese woman from America.
characters.strengths: Japanese sweets, Japanese culture in general, competitive karuta.

characters.profile: I'm Haru Urara! I love carrots and I lo~ve running because it's fun!♪ I'm going to try my very best to finish first!
characters.slogan: She has lots of losses, but won't lose hope! The girl who never gives up!

characters.profile: I'm Hishi Akebono ♪ I'll put lo~ts of love into both cooking and running for everybody! It's nice to meet you!~
characters.slogan: Large! Great! Big... plate? Bono appétit ♪

characters.profile: There are a lot of good-lookin' people here... hehe. I'll take them all on. I'm Hishiama! Come on, let's get to it!
characters.slogan: She's up for a fight! Our trusty Miss Matron.

characters.profile: I'm Hishi Miracle. I'm doing my best while keeping the vibes good. I hope you'll do the same, okay?
characters.slogan: A laid-back Umamusume. Today is business as usual.
characters.strengths: Finding forest bathing spots, avoiding being called on in class

characters.profile: I'm Hokko Tarumae, I came here from a port town in the north like a paper crane. The Loco-dol of Tomakomai♪ ...Hmm, maybe I could come up with something more clever.
characters.slogan: A realist local idol. Running for Tomakomai.
characters.weaknesses: Praying for good fortune, boarding ships

characters.profile: My name is Ikuno Dictus. If you are looking for management, leave it to me. I will manage you thoroughly with an iron will.
characters.slogan: A thorough managing principle. A capable Umamusume who combines hot with cold.

characters.profile: The hell are ya sayin'?! I'm Inari One! As you can see, I'm an efficient child of Edo! I wanna become the biggest Umamusume of them all!
characters.slogan: The hell are ya sayin'?! A self-proclaimed "Edo child" with lightning speed.
characters.strengths: Target phooting, die cutting, goldfish scooping

characters.profile: Hey hey~! I'm Ines Fujin! I'm going to race and work hard to make sure my family is happy!~
characters.slogan: Full of energy! A hardworking family girl!

characters.profile: Jungle Pocket's the name. I'll be your partner, as long as you wanna run! But don't think you'll be taking my title of "the strongest"!
characters.slogan: Dashing down the highway to become the strongest! A flaw- lessly charismatic delinquent.
characters.strengths: Huddling, climbing trees, the first karaoke song

characters.profile: ...I am K.S. Miracle. I will repay everyone who gave me this life... I will make miracles happen.
characters.slogan: A miracle as a sign of gratitude. A kind and gentle Umamusume.
characters.strengths: Guiding the way, transcribing music by ear

characters.profile: Nice to meetcha! I'm Katsuragi Ace. Don't be afraid to dream, okay? I'll break down any walls that stand in your way!
characters.slogan: Aiming to become the ace! A lively girl dashing towards her great ambition.

characters.profile: Oh-ho-ho! I am Kawakami Princess... Yes, a princess above all princesses! I'll daintily knock you off of your feet at the races!
characters.slogan: Aim to become a Princess! A magnificent tomboyish Umamusume.

characters.profile: Ohhh-ho-ho! My name is King Halo. As a first-class Umamusume, I'll give you the best results... And show the world this talent of mine!
characters.slogan: A domineering young lady. Her pride is higher than the sky!
characters.weaknesses: Crowds, heat, etc. aren't appropriate for the King

characters.profile: キセキです！苦しい修行、熱い友情、\nドラマティックな勝利！そんなレースの\n世界で、あたしが主人公になってみせます！
characters.slogan: 奇跡を描く、\n情熱系クリエイター
characters.weaknesses: 結果発表を待つこと、リズムゲーム

characters.profile: I'm Kitasan Black! I'm going to run as fast as I can to make this race as exciting as a festival!
characters.slogan: She lights up our hearts! A cheerful and lively festival girl!
characters.weaknesses: Turning a blind eye to things

characters.profile: ラヴズオンリーユーです♪\n私の愛【ラヴ】は一方通行じゃなく双方向！\n配信で、世界中に広めていこうね♡
characters.slogan: ラヴミー♡ラヴユー♡\n愛あふれる配信者
characters.strengths: 映像編集、いろんな人とコラボすること
characters.weaknesses: お絵かき、ホラーゲーム、何もしない休み

characters.profile: My name's Lucky Lilac, nice to meetcha. I'll overcome any and all trials to become the star of the turf.
characters.slogan: The flower that survives the long winter will surely bloom magnificently.
characters.strengths: オリジナルのお掃除グッズ作り
characters.weaknesses: ナメクジ、廃墟、ヒトコワ系の怪談

characters.profile: ...I am Manhattan Cafe. I have a friend I want to catch up to... The girl who always runs in front of me... She's right there...
characters.slogan: A mysterious girl chasing after a ghostly shadow.

characters.profile: え、えっと…その――『こんにちは☆\nマルちゃんだよ♪幼馴染のラヴちゃんと\n一緒に、頑張りまーすっ☆』
characters.slogan: パぺットの陰から、\n世界を望む

characters.profile: Hi, I'm Maruzensky! Did you come to see this new style of running too? Hehe ♪ Even though I'm crazy about it... I don't know how to feel ♪
characters.slogan: Retro-Showa style Supercar Lady

characters.profile: Hi hi~, I'm Marvelous Sunday! I'm bringing a Marvelous feeling to the whole world! Now, let's all be Marvelous together!
characters.slogan: Marvelous! Vibrant, invincible, and changing the world!
characters.strengths: Listening to many people at once

characters.profile: Yoo-hoo, I'm Matikanetannhauser. I've been practicing hard so I won't lose to anyon—Oh, today's my day off?!
characters.slogan: A beloved but unpolished great talent. Today is her big day!

characters.profile: Hello! They call me Matikanefukukitaru! I believe in the divine messages of Shiraoki-sama, and I constantly am working on my fortune telling, waiting for the day I'll be blessed with good fortune!
characters.slogan: Come, good fortune! A divination-loving happy-go-lucky girl.

characters.profile: Ehehe, I'm Mayachin!☆ I love thrilling and exciting things~ Nice to meetcha!
characters.slogan: A sweet little sister. She can't wait to grow up!

characters.profile: I-I'm Me-Meisho Doto! U-uhm, uhm... I've been trying my best to become more confident in... m-mythelf- OWW!
characters.slogan: She's trying to stay positive! A negative go-getter.

characters.profile: My name is Mejiro Ardan. I want to run proudly, even if these legs will be short-lived... Even if only for a moment, I would like to shine in a race.
characters.slogan: Shine short and bright. The young lady with glass legs.

characters.profile: ............Hmm? Is it time for me to introduce myself? Heheheh, my name is Mejiro Bright. I will try my best as a member of the Mejiro family~.
characters.slogan: A strong will at a loose pace! Carefree lady.
characters.weaknesses: Eating ice cream before it melts

characters.profile: Hello... I'm Mejiro Dober. I'm a Umamusume of the Mejiro family, and I'm not ashamed to say that... I intend to do my best.
characters.slogan: I want to change! A young lady running with scars from her past.

characters.profile: My name is Mejiro McQueen. Conquering the "Spring Tennosho" has been a long-cherished goal of the Mejiro family, and I will do it with my own two legs.
characters.slogan: Pride of the prestigious Mejiro family. Elegant, determined young lady.

characters.profile: I'm Mejiro Palmer! How ya doing~? Well, if you ever need anything, I'm always here. Feel free to talk to me ♪
characters.slogan: Let's take it easy. A reliable and positive gal.

characters.profile: You want to get to know me? Then come to the turf by all means. There you'll learn everything about me... Mejiro Ramonu.
characters.slogan: Races with a love supreme… A devilish flower, blooming unrivaled at the top.

characters.profile: My name is Mejiro Ryan! Train your body, stay healthy! Grow some muscle, stay fit! Let's go for it!
characters.slogan: She feels fresh and sporty! Even her glistening sweat is pure.

characters.profile: My name is Mihono Bourbon. My goal is locked onto becoming a Triple Crown Umamusume. Please refer to my data for legwork and other information.
characters.slogan: Your orders will be strictly followed! Cyborg Umamusume.

characters.profile: There's a breeze only racing can offer. It's light, clear, and..... an unrestrained tailwind. --I'm Mr. C.B.. Nice to meet you.
characters.slogan: Bound by nothing! A cheerful and flawless Umamusume.
characters.weaknesses: Lining up, lies and careless misrepresentations

characters.profile: It's Nakayama Festa. Halfhearted races don't give me a thrill. Hey... Let me feel the intense heat of the race...!
characters.slogan: All or nothing! An outlandish gambler who attacks at the last second.
characters.strengths: Looking after plants and small animals

characters.profile: ...I'm Narita Brian. I don't have a story to tell you. I just run, crush, and win.
characters.slogan: She speaks with her back! A hard-headed, stubborn, lone wolf!

characters.profile: Narita Taishin. That's all. I just want to win and shove it in the faces of the ones who made fun of me... Leave me alone.
characters.slogan: Cool and dry! Even though she's small, she still wins.

characters.profile: Hello, I'm Narita Top Road! I will do my best to live up to the expectations of all of the ones who support me!
characters.slogan: Flawless honor student! But she likes the supporting role...?
characters.strengths: Long passes in soccer, making vocabulary flash cards

characters.profile: Neo Universe would like to propose a friendly "contact". In other words— "Nice to meet you".
characters.slogan: A little strange? Or more than just a little? Umamusume with an outer space vibe.
characters.strengths: Predicting the weather, falling block games

characters.profile: Uh... I'm Nice Nature. I guess I don't really live up to the name of "Nice Nature", haha... Let's take it easy, shall we?
characters.slogan: Expectations? No, thank you! A cynical girl.
characters.strengths: Table tennis, searching for tasty snacks

characters.profile: Hello, my name is Nishino Flower. I want to become a nice, sisterly Umamusume so that everyone can rely on me...!
characters.slogan: Blooming smile ♪ An attentive Umamusume.

characters.profile: Nyahaha! No Reason's the name, and world domination is my game! Let's get this coup started!
characters.slogan: She needs no reason to follow her dreams to world domination!
characters.weaknesses: うす～い枕、花の蜜の香り

characters.profile: North Flight here! My outfits, make-up, accessories and above all, huge effort are what makes me shine! So please watch me!
characters.slogan: Cultivating glitter! She's a shining fashionista.

characters.profile: I am Oguri Cap. I'm going to do my best to make everyone in my hometown happy. Please take care of me.
characters.slogan: A simple and cool dreamer from the countryside.

characters.profile: You'd better show your respect by kneeling before me, the great Orfevre, and respect my reign.
characters.slogan: Reigns supreme in heaven or hell. A tyrant, ruler of the turf.
characters.strengths: Everything the world has to offer, doing as she pleases

characters.profile: 私の名はレッドディザイア。\nこの先、行く道は試練に満ちておりますが、\n全て乗り越え、真の聖女となりましょう！
characters.slogan: 不撓の聖女、\n試練の果てで救い主とならん
characters.strengths: 応急手当て、クッキー作り、お洗濯

characters.profile: I'm Rhein Kraft! To make dreams come true, to break open paths, to connect with the future. That's the kind of umamusume I want to be!
characters.slogan: To the twinkling future! A dreaming umamusume, bright like the sun.
characters.strengths: Making things by hand, rock climbing

characters.profile: I'm... Rice Shower. Um... I'm a useless girl who makes others unhappy... but I'm trying my best to change!
characters.slogan: Unhappy disposition? A sorrowful maiden who lives a praiseworthy life.

characters.profile: I have but one goal: to be the Strongest! I want my name to go down in history, and to do that I'll paint myself in the best light!
characters.slogan: Creating her legend! Aims to be the strongest, in her own peculiar ways.
characters.strengths: データ整理（表計算ソフト派）、ながら運動
characters.weaknesses: 『こちら側のどこからでも開けられます』

characters.profile: Hello! My name is Sakura Bakushin O! As you can see, I am a brilliant class representative! Let's set a great example for everyone! BAKUSHIIIN!
characters.slogan: The great and reckless class president. She's always on the move!
characters.weaknesses: Things that require more than 3 steps

characters.profile: サクラチトセオーです。…おや、お顔色が？\nよければ、食を見直してみては。\n気血水の整いは、日々の活力の源ですから
characters.slogan: 食を以て薬とす――\n鷹揚自若の仙者ウマ娘

characters.profile: I'm S-Sakura Chiyono O! I will make my dream of standing on my ideal stage with the person of my dreams blossom!
characters.slogan: Chase your dreams! An honest and hardworking girl!
characters.weaknesses: Cars and airplanes (prone to motion sickness)

characters.profile: I'm Sakura Laurel. My goal is the world. The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe! --Well, it's just a "dream" now, but... I'll make it come true someday for sure!
characters.slogan: Calm and unyielding. A cherry blossom blooming beyond winter.
characters.strengths: Eating salad as if it was wanko soba
characters.weaknesses: The moment of take-off (otherwise fine on planes)

characters.profile: I'm Satono Crown! I will bring pride to the Satono Group. I'll give it my all. I will find strength in adversity! Just you wait!
characters.slogan: The turf's illusionist! A trustworthy elite older sister.
characters.weaknesses: The midsummer heat, unscheduled days off

characters.profile: My name is Satono Diamond. My fate has never been decided from the beginning. I will make the future shine with my running!
characters.slogan: Diamond-grade core! A young lady who defies jinxes!

characters.profile: Haa-ha-ha-ha! It's Seeking the Pearl! Guess what? The world is full of possibilities, and I'm gonna prove it to you!
characters.slogan: Take on the world! The older sister who makes the world her oyster.

characters.profile: Yahoo-, it's Seiun Sky. Take your time and relax... When you're aiming for a big goal, it's important to take your time, right?
characters.slogan: My pace, my life. Like a drifting cloud...
characters.weaknesses: Small, cramped places (The gate, the gate!)

characters.profile: Roar~! It's Shinko Windy! You scared? You can tell me if you're scared~! ...Hey! Don't ignore me! Grrrrr!
characters.slogan: She loves causing mischief! If you don't give her attention, she'll bite you!
characters.strengths: Pranks, digging holes, climbing on roofs

characters.profile: I'm Silence Suzuka. I like to run. I'm not giving the lead to anyone. Um... That's all.
characters.slogan: The Silent Rider. Aiming to go beyond the speed of sound

characters.profile: Sirius Symboli! No need to talk about the race. Just shut up and watch. I'm going to conquer the world and prove that I'm the strongest.
characters.slogan: World's brightest star to be! Charismatic Umamusu of ambition.

characters.profile: I'm Smart Falcon! You can call me Falco! My dream is to become a Umadol! Autographs are always welcome ☆
characters.slogan: She'll handle the fanservice! Future Top Umadol.

characters.profile: Behold, my lovely musciciste! Join me, Sounds of Earth, to create a wonderful melodia together!
characters.slogan: The race is her ensemble! An artistic Umamusume with a love for music.

characters.profile: My name is Special Week! My dream is to be the best Umamusume in Japan! I'm gonna pull my own weight to make my moms proud!
characters.slogan: Gonna do 'er best! A naive country girl beelining to her dream.

characters.profile: よろしく、ステイゴールドだ。\nさあ、楽しい旅にしよう！\n黄金の旅路を気ままに、な
characters.slogan: 奔放な放浪者！\nいつか見た黄金の旅路へ
characters.strengths: 金の真贋鑑定、昼寝、ヒッチハイク

characters.profile: My name is Still in Love. I... I'm not worthy of any more introduction... I like to... keep those things to myself...
characters.slogan: Stuck between instinct and intuition. The craving bewitcher.
characters.strengths: ボビンレース、赤い果実のジャムづくり
characters.weaknesses: 大きな姿見、香りの強い食べ物、満月

characters.profile: Tee-hee... I'm Super Creek~ I'll do my best to make everyone smile. Please leave it to me ♪
characters.slogan: A gentle older sister who can heal you with her calm, motherly nature.

characters.profile: Sweep Tosho is my pre-transformation name! I am Sweepy the Magical Girl! Now this is sorcery! Aaah!! (Bonk)
characters.slogan: A pure and troublesome child! She'll definitely be a witch!
characters.strengths: Guessing the names of plants and flowers (sometimes made-up)

characters.profile: --I'm Symboli Kris S. I am indebted to the Symboli family. As one of them, I will carry out both the objectives I have set, and the "mission" I have been assigned.
characters.slogan: Foreign-born, taciturn, missionary.

characters.profile: I am Symboli Rudolf. I am the one who will stand at the top of every Umamusume and lead them to become "Emperors". Those of you who share my aspirations, let's work together to conquer the world!
characters.slogan: The reigning "Emperor", her authority is absolute!

characters.profile: Haa-ha-ha-ha! I am the strongest and most beautiful of them all, the "Supreme King", T.M. Opera O! Now, let the legend begin!
characters.slogan: Haughty king of the Opera. Her laugh is loud and proud!

characters.profile: Howdy! I'm Taiki Shuttle! I'm here to make everyone happy with my powerful running!
characters.slogan: American-born friendly girl.

characters.profile: Ah'm Tamamo Cross! A'hm gonna win'n win'n win to make a name for myself! Don't underestimate me just 'cause ah'm small!
characters.slogan: Just like a bolt of lightning on the attack.

characters.profile: I am Tanino Gimlet! What I seek is the ideal "me". I have no intention of deceiving my temporary self. Destroy it, kick it down, and progress to the end!
characters.slogan: Get drunk on this aesthetic! A peaky, aesthetic, destructive god.
characters.strengths: Mythology, philosophy, pronouncing the letter 'v', DIY

characters.profile: Come, friends, and join me on a journey where excitement and dance awaits! Everyone who wants to dream, climb aboard this vessel  with me!
characters.slogan: Capturing friends, dreams and money! An Umamusume who lives for her dream of great adventure.

characters.profile: Heya, I'm Tokai Teio! I'm going to be an undefeated Triple Crown Umamusume, so don't let me out of your sight!
characters.slogan: Invincible and cute! An innocent, hoppin' girl.

characters.profile: I'm Tosen Jordan. My dream is... actually, serious topics are NG~☆ Anyways, look at my nails! Aren't they cool?
characters.slogan: The uncouth Jordan! A modern-day gal ☆

characters.profile: Nice to meetcha, Tray-chan♪ Let's look for exciting, thrilling things together!
characters.slogan: Seeking thrills! She's a data junkie, hunting for solutions.
characters.strengths: Video editing, holding chopsticks, string figures

characters.profile: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi! Aiming to become the "Triple Crown Umamusume" of my dreams! I'll give it my all... BLEH! I-I just swallowed a lot of blood! I'm fine, I'm alright!
characters.slogan: Dreams of the triple crown!! Always full power!! Liable to break her limits!?
characters.weaknesses: The smell of compresses, low air pressure, being sick in bed

characters.profile: Twin Turbo! I'll take the first Turbo, I'll take it for sure! Let's go, Turbo, full throttle!!!
characters.slogan: Turbo full throttle! An explosive Umamusume who knows no limits!

characters.profile: I am Verxina. I won't give up until I break down everything in my path to become a queen.
characters.slogan: Deserving of the queen's throne. A celebrity Umamusume with unyielding spirit.
characters.strengths: キックボクシング、野球、バク転

characters.profile: ヴィクトワールピサと申します。\n「ひとりぼっち」をなくせるよう、世界を\n希望の輪で繋ぎたいのです。私の走りで
characters.slogan: 温かな輪を繋ぐ、\n希望の使者
characters.strengths: トランペット、おかしの等分

characters.profile: I'm Vivlos! One day I'll be a celebrity, racing in sparklign Dubai!♪ And you're coming with me, no ifs or buts!♪
characters.slogan: Talented at getting pampered. Dreams of crossing the big wide ocean.
characters.strengths: Cold weather, baseball, dreaming of being a celebrity

characters.profile: Yo, I'm Vodka! My goal is to be the coolest Umamusume in the world! I'm not gonna do anything stupid. Remember that!
characters.slogan: Runaway youth! A pure-hearted, delinquent roadster
characters.strengths: Acting like she's riding a motorcycle

characters.profile: I'm Win Variation. My only goal is to become the leader... the Principal! No matter how tough my opponents may be, I refuse to give up!
characters.slogan: A strong willed Umamusume who never gives up, no matter how many times she loses!

characters.profile: My... My... My dream is to be a Derby Umamusume! And then there's... ah! My name!!!! My name is Winning Ticket! Nice to meet you!
characters.slogan: Laugh and cry to your heart's content! An honest girl who's true to her feelings.
characters.strengths: Full of support, full of emotion

characters.profile: I'm Wonder Acute. I'm a slow learner, but I'm a hard worker. Please take care of me.
characters.slogan: Relaxed, calm, and patient. A spirited Umamusume who never gives up.
characters.strengths: Bead crafts, decorative cutting of daikon

characters.profile: I'm Yaeno Muteki. As a disciple of the Kongo Yaegaki way, I desire to race with the strong. Come on, let's fight like crazy!!
characters.slogan: Charge, with might and decorum. A rugged Umamusume.

characters.profile: ......My name is Yamanin Zephyr. My goal is to be the wind... I want to be like the wind that runs faster and freer than anything else!
characters.slogan: A naturally breezy Umamusume. Even so, her soul is like a gale.
characters.strengths: Tonguing (wind instruments), flying kites, song & dance improv

characters.profile: Oh, my name is Yukino Bijin! My dream is to become a stylish city gal in the Twankle Series! Phew... I hope I said that right...
characters.slogan: Aiming to be a City Girl! A hardworking girl from a rural area.

characters.profile: My name is Zenno Rob Roy. Well... this is me, but I'm longing for a heroic tale... I would like to tell my story within a race someday...!
characters.slogan: One day, she'll have a heroic tale. An imaginative reader.
